title: Identify and draft livestock
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Identify and draft livestock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify animals

pcs.text: Identify and confirm animal selection criteria from production and marketing information and supervisor or management instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and confirm animal selection criteria from production and marketing information and supervisor or management instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and confirm animal selection criteria from production and marketing information and supervisor or management instructions.

pcs.text: Handle and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and sort livestock using good stock handling techniques and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Identify and separate animals according to selection criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and separate animals according to selection criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and separate animals according to selection criteria.

pcs.text: Apply identification devices safely and humanely
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply identification devices safely and humanely?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply identification devices safely and humanely.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.title: Assess and select animals

pcs.text: Assess animals according to industry and workplace criteria and guidelines

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess animals according to industry and workplace criteria and guidelines.

pcs.text: Rank and select animals using workplace criteria

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Rank and select animals using workplace criteria.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report selection?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report selection.

pcs.text: Observe prescribed medication withholding periods when selecting animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Observe prescribed medication withholding periods when selecting animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Observe prescribed medication withholding periods when selecting animals.

pcs.text: Complete and maintain records and documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete and maintain records and documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete and maintain records and documentation.

pcs.text: Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply workplace biosecurity policies where required.
